scope: corrected Chen net-power/LHV dynamic dispatch foundation

random_load.transition_matrix_role: Zuo fast matrix controls event order only
random_load.dwell_status: engineering switching-stress setting, not identified vehicle physics

hysteresis_thresholds.stop_multiplier_reason: an optional stop must repay the current stop and one expected future restart; this is a two-state-change round trip

switch_penalty_interpretation: normalized equivalent-hydrogen trade-off parameter, not a physical degradation coefficient

representative_trajectory.selection: seed whose online-hysteresis stack-state-change reduction is closest to the split median

offline_dp_role: post-hoc lower bound using the complete demand sequence
